content.body: zcorpan: when reviewing sideshowbarker's WebKit patch for ancestorOrigins I noticed the tests didn't seem to include identity asserts. I think we should add those as they are an important part of the API contract.
content.formatted_body: zcorpan: when reviewing sideshowbarker's WebKit patch for ancestorOrigins I noticed the tests didn't seem to include identity asserts. I think we should add those as they are an important part of the API contract.

content.body: Just waiting for a re-build to finish so I can confirm the code actually does what I think it should be doing
I wish we didn’t need that identity requirement. Things would be much easier if we didn’t 😄
